# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build, Test, and Deploy on Pull Request

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize]

env:
  GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
  PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
  PR_DESCRIPTION: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Node.js and npm
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build and test
        run: npm run build && npm run test

      - name: Notify on failure
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/github-script@v5
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          script: |
            const octokit = require("@octokit/core");
            const { createComment } = octokit({
              auth: process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN,
            });
            createComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.name,
              issue_number: context.pullRequest.number,
              body:
                "PR failed. Please check the logs for more information.",
            });

      - name: Create deployment
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.1.5
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PASSWORD }}

      - name: Notify on success
        if: success()
        uses: actions/github-script@v5
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          script: |
            const octokit = require("@octokit/core");
            const { createComment } = octokit({
              auth: process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN,
            });
            createComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.name,
              issue_number: context.pullRequest.number,
              body:
                "PR successful. Deployed to ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}",
            });

      - name: Commit message
        run: |
          git config --global user.email "${GITHUB_ACTOR}@users.noreply.github.com"
          git config --global user.name "${GITHUB_ACTOR}"
          echo "${PR_TITLE} - ${PR_DESCRIPTION}" | sed 's/\n/ /g' > commit-msg.txt
          git add .
          git commit -F commit-msg.txt

      - name: Push changes
        run: |
          git remote set-url origin https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}.git
          git push origin HEAD:${GITHUB_EVENT_NAME}
